success_criteria: feedback_canceller_review.ipynb present under artifacts and files_created in attempt outputs
assertions in notebook pass when executed
actual_outputs.json contains deliverable_refs including the notebook and computed_results matching dsp_note.md

planned_changes: Implement a Jupyter notebook at [EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT] that reproduces all tables and numbers in dsp_note.md using only the embedded packet data.

Notebook content checklist: read embedded packet; compute packet maxima (loop_gain_dB_max, phase_margin_deg_max, adaptation_rate_max, artifact_score_max); compute normalized metrics n_k = x_k / max(x_k) for each record and metric; apply weights [0.40,0.30,0.20,0.10] in the specified metric order; compute weighted scores and ranking; determine top-quartile count = ceil(0.25 * 4) = 1 and label immediate_action; evaluate hard limits and assign needs_review/stable labels; perform 5% adverse sensitivity perturbation and show results.

Add inline unit tests in the notebook using assert statements or pytest cells that: (1) confirm computed maxima equal the maxima reported in dsp_note.md, (2) assert normalized values equal raw/max calculations, (3) assert weighted_scores equal the numeric values reported (R1..R4), and (4) assert that after a 5% sensitivity increase/decrease the reclassification outcomes match dsp_note.md's sensitivity conclusions.

Re-run the notebook in a clean environment; capture and commit the executed notebook (.ipynb) and an updated actual_outputs.json that lists the notebook under files_created/deliverables and contains computed_results identical to dsp_note.md.

Update dsp_note.md to reference [EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT] and remove the unsupported claim that the notebook already exists. Add a short reproducibility section pointing reviewers to the notebook and instructions to re-run it.
Resubmit attempt 477-revised with the new artifacts and ensure the attempt manifest includes the notebook path so the verifier can detect and run it.
